GenAiPlugin.description: Handles post-installation onboarding for VDD devices. Confirms installation status, verifies telemetry from AssetAttribute records, and sends welcome message with dashboard access.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: Route to this topic when a VDD device installation is completed or when Asset status changes to Installed. Step 1: Use Get Install Status to confirm the asset is installed and retrieve customer/vehicle details. Step 2: Use Confirm Telemetry to read AssetAttribute records and verify GPS accuracy, signal strength, and battery voltage are healthy. Step 3: Use Send Onboarding Message to send the customer a welcome SMS with telemetry status summary and fleet dashboard access link. Always execute all 3 steps in sequence. If telemetry shows issues, still send the onboarding message but note the issues.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Can read install status, verify telemetry from asset attributes, and send onboarding welcome messages. Cannot modify device settings, create work orders, or change asset status.
